name: Nocturne Evening
description: An exquisite evening gown crafted from hand-dyed Ghanaian silk, featuring delicate kente-inspired embroidery along the bodice. The deep midnight hues shift subtly under light, creating an otherworldly presence that commands every room.

name: Soleil Day
description: A luminous day ensemble inspired by the golden warmth of the Accra sun. Woven from organic cotton and adorned with hand-stamped adinkra motifs, this piece bridges heritage and contemporary elegance.

name: Azure Atelier
description: A sculptural masterpiece in oceanic blues, tailored with precision from Italian wool and Ghanaian indigo-dyed accents. Each stitch is placed by hand over 120 hours of meticulous craftsmanship.

name: Velours Rouge
description: Rich crimson velvet meets West African brocade in this show-stopping piece. The structured silhouette is softened by cascading drapes, creating a dialogue between power and grace.

name: Lumière Coat
description: An architectural coat that transforms the wearer into a beacon of understated luxury. Constructed from triple-weight cashmere with gold-thread detailing inspired by Ashanti royal textile traditions.

name: Cristal Gown
description: Our pièce de résistance — a floor-length gown encrusted with hand-set crystals that cascade like frozen rain. Over 400 hours of artisan work make each gown a singular treasure.

name: Ambra Silk Set
description: A two-piece ensemble in amber-toned raw silk, hand-woven in our Accra atelier. The relaxed yet refined silhouette speaks to the modern connoisseur who values substance over spectacle.

name: Ombré Draped
description: Flowing ombré chiffon layers create a mesmerizing gradient effect — from deep plum to soft lavender. Each panel is individually dyed using traditional Ghanaian ombré techniques.

name: Noir Tuxedo
description: The definitive reimagination of the classic tuxedo — cut from jet-black Italian wool with satin lapels bearing subtle adinkra symbols. Effortless authority, impeccably tailored.
